Joel Robinson

Marketing & Communications Manager

Explore My Work

Brands I've Worked With

Trusted by industry leaders across retail, tech, arts, and government

Marketing 2022-2023

A selection of top performing campaigns and social content

Social Media Management

Walton Arts Center & Walmart AMP

As a project and social media manager, I crafted compelling content to tell the Walton Arts Center and Walmart AMP story. Leveraging strategic planning and creative marketing techniques, I helped bring world-class performing artists to Northwest Arkansas audiences.

@waltonartscenter
Content Production

National Museum of the US Army

In 2022, as a project manager and social media producer for NMUSA, I created diverse assets to tell the story of the U.S. Army. Located just outside Washington D.C., the museum presents over 200 years of Army history through individual soldiers' stories.

View on Instagram
View on Instagram

Podcast Productions

Conversations with industry leaders produced for Think Medium

2021

Dr. Sumbul Desai

Vice President of Health, Apple

Exploring how seemingly irrelevant experience can prove to be very useful in maximizing your impact.

2021

Dr. Karen DeSalvo

Chief Health Officer, Google

Former Assistant Secretary for Health with the Obama administration discusses working at the nexus of science, policy, and politics.

2021

Marcus Osborne

Senior Vice President, Walmart Health

With nearly 4,800 stores in the US, Walmart's move into healthcare could change the industry forever.

Documentary Films

Award-winning storytelling for broadcast and web

ABC - NWA Alive

National Parks Documentary

A musical artist's journey singing about the National Parks to remember his father.

ABC - NWA Alive

Tram Colwin

From Vietnam to Northwest Arkansas: a full-time watercolor artist's inspiring journey.

University of Arkansas

Arkansas Delta Freshman

Following three students from the Arkansas Delta through their transformative freshman year.

CRU

CRU Vision Dinner 2017

Three student stories from among 27,940 at the University of Arkansas.

Southern Baptist Convention

Why Church
